## Runtime contract snapshot (Current, audited in issue #24)
language id `puml`
.puml
.plantuml
.iuml
onCommand:puml.preview.open
onCommand:puml.lsp.restart
puml.preview.open
puml.lsp.restart
puml.lsp.enabled
puml.lsp.path
puml.lsp.trace
puml.renderSvg
puml.renderScene
puml.export
puml.explainDiagnostic
puml.languageService
./scripts/vscode-smoke.sh
